# How to disable automatic renewal for NCE subscriptions

If you want to prevent your NCE subscription from automatically renewing, you can disable automatic renewal by placing a configuration order.

Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current commitment period and will expire afterward without any additional charges.

To disable auto-renewal:

1. Go to **Marketplace** > **Subscriptions**.&#x20;
2. Select the required NCE subscription. Make sure that the subscription and the agreement are active.
3. On the subscription details page, select the dropdown arrow <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="" data-size="line">, then choose **Configure**.&#x20;
4. In the guided configuration flow, do the following:
   1. **Auto-renewal** – Choose **Disabled**, then select **Next**.&#x20;
   2. **Order details** – Provide any reference details and order notes. Then, select **Next**.
   3. **Review order** – Review the order details, then select **Place order**.
   4. **Summary** – Select **View order** to open the order details page or select **Close**.

After the order is processed, the subscription details page displays the status as **Auto-renewal disabled**.&#x20;

{% hint style="success" %}
If you want to re-enable the automatic renewal, follow the same steps you used to disable it, but choose the **Enable** option in the configuration wizard.
{% endhint %}
